arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's flying Dutchman, a Moroccan speedster and Tottenham's out-of-favour full-back... Liverpool's options to replace Trent Alexander-Arnold as he nears Real Madrid move
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been keen on Alexander-Arnold as a long-term replacement for Dani Carvajal, with reports claiming Los Blancos have sent him a proposal.
